OTH_WVR_TYPE_MOS 
LABEL: 
Other Waiver Type Months 
DESCRIPTION: Number of months the beneficiary was enrolled in any other type of waiver in the calendar year

NUM

2

T-MSIS annual demographic and eligibility TAF
